name: BMW F30/F31/F34 3 Series (1.5L 3-cyl turbo petrol, B38)

serviceNotes.engine oil: BMW CBS for modular B engines; maximum oil interval commonly ~30,000 km in EU with display-driven actual due dates. Sources: BMW F30 LCI service data, owner’s manual.
serviceNotes.micro filter: Cabin filter per CBS (~30,000 km typical planning).
serviceNotes.brake fluid: Replace every 24 months regardless of mileage.
serviceNotes.air cleaner element: Turbocharged B38: engine air filter on CBS (~60,000 km typical).
serviceNotes.spark plugs: Three-cylinder B38: spark plug renewal commonly aligned with CBS long-life schedule (~90,000 km). Confirm in service display.
serviceNotes.check front brake pads: CBS-style front pad inspection; 50,000 km matches newer F3x CBS inspection spacing.
serviceNotes.xDrive transfer case fluid: xDrive only; specialist interval often 60,000–100,000 km.
serviceNotes.differential fluids: xDrive only; specialist interval often 60,000–100,000 km.
serviceNotes.intake carbon clean: Direct injection: carbon clean ~120,000 km as preventive maintenance.
